response: The ABC television series "Agent Carter" was inspired by the 2011 film "Captain America: The Winter Soldier" and cast Dominic Cooper as young Howard Stark. The series features Peggy Carter, a Marvel Comics character, who goes undercover to clear the name of her friend Howard Stark, set in the Marvel Cinematic Universe. Dominic Cooper portrayed Howard Stark in the Marvel Cinematic Universe films "Iron Man 2", "Ant-Man", and "Agent Carter".
